---
title: "Coverage map"
toc: true
---

This page is a **feature-area map** of the test suite (not the line-by-line HTML coverage report).

- **HTML coverage report**: see [Coverage](../coverage.qmd) (links to `docs/coverage/`)
- **Source map**: `tests/testthat/COVERAGE_MAP.md`

## Map (feature areas Ôćĺ tests)

### Legend

- Ôťů Covered
- ÔÜá´ŞĆ Partial coverage
- ÔŁî Not covered / Missing
- ­čöž Needs refactoring

### Kernel library (d/p/q/r)

| Feature | Test file | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Mix d/p/q/r functions | `test-kernels.R` | Ôťů |
| Mix+GPD splice behavior | `test-kernels.R` | Ôťů |
| Scalar+GPD behavior | `test-kernels.R` | Ôťů |
| Roundtrip q(p) Ôćĺ p(q) | `test-kernels.R` | Ôťů |
| Edge cases (bounds, NA) | `test-kernels.R` | ÔÜá´ŞĆ Some covered |

### Bundle build layer

| Feature | Test file | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Spec validation | `test-bundle.R` | Ôťů |
| CRP vs SB code assembly | `test-dispatch-separation.R` | Ôťů |
| Kernel registry | `test-smoke-core-workflows.R` | Ôťů |
| Input validation errors | `test-bundle.R` | Ôťů |
| Conditional (with X) | `test-smoke-core-workflows.R` | Ôťů |
| GPD flag handling | `test-smoke-core-workflows.R` | Ôťů |

### MCMC run layer

| Feature | Test file | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Compile + run returns structure | Per-kernel tests (`test-normal.R`, etc.) | Ôťů |
| SB backend workflows | Per-kernel tests | Ôťů |
| CRP backend workflows | Per-kernel tests | Ôťů |
| GPD vs non-GPD | Per-kernel tests | Ôťů |
| Conditional vs unconditional | Per-kernel tests | Ôťů |
| Caching behavior | `helper-cache.R` (infrastructure) | ÔÜá´ŞĆ Indirect |

### Prediction layer

| Feature | Test file | Status |
|---|---|---|
| `type="mean"` | `test-predict-unconditional.R`, `helper-predict-distribution.R` | Ôťů |
| `type="median"` | `test-predict-unconditional.R` | Ôťů |
| `type="quantile"` | `test-predict-contracts.R`, `helper-predict-distribution.R` | Ôťů |
| `type="sample"` | `helper-predict-distribution.R` | Ôťů |
| `type="density"` | `helper-predict-distribution.R` | Ôťů |
| `type="survival"` | `helper-predict-distribution.R` | Ôťů |
| Conditional x/newdata contracts | `test-predict-contracts.R` | Ôťů |
| Parallel ncores determinism | `test-predict-contracts.R` | Ôťů |
| Credible intervals | `test-predict-contracts.R` | Ôťů |

### S3 methods & UX

Note: `fitted.mixgpd_fit` and `residuals.mixgpd_fit` are **conditional-only** (covariate models).

| Feature | Test file | Status |
|---|---|---|
| `print.mixgpd_fit` | `helper-predict-distribution.R` | Ôťů |
| `summary.mixgpd_fit` | `helper-predict-distribution.R` | Ôťů |
| `plot.mixgpd_fit` | `helper-predict-distribution.R` | Ôťů |
| `fitted.mixgpd_fit` (conditional only) | `test-fitted.R`, `test-hpd-intervals.R` | Ôťů |
| `residuals.mixgpd_fit` (raw; conditional only) | `test-fitted.R` | Ôťů |
| `residuals.mixgpd_fit` (PIT; conditional only) | `helper-predict-distribution.R` when has_X | Ôťů |
| `plot.mixgpd_predict` | `test-predict-unconditional.R` | Ôťů |
| `plot.mixgpd_fitted` | `test-fitted.R` | Ôťů |
| `params()` extractor | `test-fitted.R`, `test-causal-predict.R` | Ôťů |

### Causal inference

| Feature | Test file | Status |
|---|---|---|
| `build_causal_bundle` | `test-smoke-core-workflows.R`, `test-causal.R` | Ôťů |
| `run_mcmc_causal` | `test-causal.R` | Ôťů |
| PS models: logit/probit/naive/disabled | `test-causal.R` | Ôťů |
| Mixed backends (trt/con) | `test-causal.R` | Ôťů |
| `cate()` / `cqte()` | `test-causal.R` | Ôťů |
| `ate()` / `qte()` | `test-causal.R` | Ôťů |
| `att()` / `qtt()` | `test-causal.R` | Ôťů |
| Credible intervals | `test-causal.R` | Ôťů |

## Keep this map up to date

When adding or moving tests, update `tests/testthat/COVERAGE_MAP.md` and (optionally) mirror key rows here.

<!-- cmgpd-footer:start -->
## Prereqs
- Required packages and data for this page are listed in the setup chunks above.

## Outputs
- This page renders model fits, diagnostics, and summary artifacts generated by package APIs.

## Interpretation
- Canonical concept page: [Spec And Contracts](spec-and-contracts.qmd)
- Treat this page as an application/example view and use the canonical page for core definitions.

## Next
- Continue to the linked canonical concept page, then return for implementation-specific details.
<!-- cmgpd-footer:end -->
